message:
fix: ensure reader.releaseLock() called in SSE stream handling

Wrap SSE event parsing loop in try/finally to guarantee reader.releaseLock()
is called when the loop exits, whether normally or due to error.

Previously, if an error occurred during stream reading, the lock would
not be released, potentially causing resource leaks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
